collectiondata.overview:
Best India to Australia Tour Package – Explore the Land Down Under in Style
Start your journey with the best India to Australia tour package, a seamless blend of iconic landmarks, thrilling adventures, and unique cultural experiences. Whether you're traveling with family, on a honeymoon, or part of a group, Travelxploria offers fully guided Australia tour packages from India designed to match your travel style and budget. For more exciting destinations, explore our popular India to Bali Tour Package or India to Malaysia Tour Package.
"Over 3 lakh Indian tourists visited Australia in 2023," according to Tourism Australia, reflecting the growing popularity of curated international travel among Indian families and honeymooners.

Why Choose an Australia Tour Package from India?

Iconic Landmarks, Natural Wonders, and Vibrant Cities
Australia captivates with its contrasting landscapes and dynamic cities. From the world-renowned Sydney Opera House to the majestic Great Barrier Reef, every destination offers an unforgettable moment. With a fully guided Australia tour package from India, you’ll explore top sites with ease and comfort.
All guided sightseeing tours are led by certified professionals with local knowledge, ensuring both safety and depth of experience.

Ideal for Families, Honeymooners, and Adventure Seekers
Whether you're seeking the best India to Australia tour package for families or looking for affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages, Travelxploria has tailored options. Our tours combine adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion for all types of travelers. For honeymoon plans, check out our dedicated honeymoon packages, and solo explorers can find curated options in our solo travel packages.
Sample testimonial: "Travelxploria made our honeymoon magical. From a private Great Barrier Reef cruise to wine tasting in Yarra Valley, everything was seamless!" – Priya & Rakesh, New Delhi.

Easy Travel Options and Visa Process for Indian Tourists
Enjoy hassle-free visa assistance, smooth flight bookings, and expert planning. Whether you're booking an Australia tour package from Delhi, Bangalore, or Chennai, our experienced team ensures a seamless travel experience.
Australia tourist visa fees for Indian citizens start at approximately ₹9,500. We assist with document preparation and submission through certified travel advisors.

Top India to Australia Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Australia Tour Package from India – Sydney, Melbourne & Gold Coast
This itinerary includes highlights like the Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach, Federation Square, and Surfers Paradise. Ideal for families and couples, it’s part of our best India to Australia tour package lineup.
Starting from ₹1.65L per person, this package includes round-trip flights, 3-star accommodations, daily breakfast, city tours, and visa processing.

Australia Honeymoon Packages from India
Our affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages include romantic experiences like wine tasting in Yarra Valley, sunset cruises in Sydney, and private Great Barrier Reef tours.
Customizations like candlelight dinners, couple photoshoots, or secluded island visits are available upon request.

Budget-Friendly Australia Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
Our Australia tour packages from India are designed to fit every budget. From 3-star accommodations to optional add-ons, we offer transparency and value.
We ensure all costs are clearly outlined, including airfares, sightseeing tickets, and taxes—no hidden charges.

Customized Australia Itineraries for Families and Groups
Choose from a range of Australia group tour packages or request a customized itinerary based on your group’s preferences—ideal for families, student trips, or corporate teams.
Whether you're a group of 6 or 60, our specialists create personalized routes with dedicated guides, luxury coaches, and meal plans. For similar curated trips, browse our family tour packages.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Australia Tour Packages

 Sydney – Opera House, Harbour Bridge & Bondi Beach
Start your journey in Sydney, a city that blends urban flair with coastal charm. Highlights include the Sydney Opera House, Darling Harbour, and coastal walks.
Pro Tip: Book an early morning harbor cruise to see the sunrise over the Opera House — an unforgettable photo moment.

Melbourne – Art, Culture, and Great Ocean Road
Known for its creativity and café culture, Melbourne also gives access to the scenic Great Ocean Road, making it a must in any Australia tour package.
We include visits to Twelve Apostles, coastal cliffs, and optional wildlife sanctuaries.

Gold Coast – Beaches, Theme Parks & Nightlife
Home to Dreamworld, Sea World, and pristine beaches, Gold Coast is a favorite in both Australia tour packages from India and family-oriented holidays.
Kids under 12 enjoy discounted theme park entries when booked in advance with our packages.

Cairns – Great Barrier Reef Adventures
A gateway to one of the world's natural wonders, Cairns is perfect for reef diving and snorkeling with guided reef tours included in many of our Australia tour packages.
Certified guides ensure safety for first-time snorkelers. Glass-bottom boat tours are also available for non-swimmers.

Brisbane, Perth & Tasmania – Offbeat and Scenic Add-ons
For those seeking hidden gems, explore Tasmania’s wilderness or enjoy city life in Brisbane and Perth, ideal for extension packages.
Tasmania’s Cradle Mountain and MONA Museum are highly recommended for nature lovers and art enthusiasts alike.

What’s Included in the Best India to Australia Tour Packages?

 Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Travelxploria includes international flights in every best India to Australia tour package, with departures available from Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai, and Bangalore. Flight options include leading airlines like Singapore Airlines, Qantas, and Emirates, with 30kg checked baggage.

Hotel Accommodation with Breakfast
Enjoy stays in centrally located 3-star to 5-star hotels with breakfast, tailored to suit both families and honeymooners. Options available near beaches, city centers, or national parks, based on your preferences.

Local Transportation and Guided Sightseeing Tours
All packages offer local transfers and guided sightseeing, essential in any fully guided Australia tour package from India. Air-conditioned coaches, hotel pick-up/drop-off, and multilingual guides are standard inclusions.

Visa Assistance, Travel Insurance & Itinerary Planning
We provide end-to-end services, from visa documentation to curated daily itineraries and travel insurance. In addition to visa support, we offer optional travel insurance covering medical emergencies, cancellations, and baggage loss.

Best Time to Visit Australia from India

 Summer (December to February) – Ideal for Beach Holidays
This is the best time for visiting Sydney, Gold Coast, and Cairns if you're looking for sun and surf. Expect temperatures between 25–35°C. Book early to avoid peak season hotel surcharges.

Spring and Autumn – Perfect Weather for Outdoor Exploration
Mild temperatures and fewer crowds make these seasons perfect for sightseeing in Melbourne, Tasmania, and Perth. Great for photography, trekking, and scenic road trips like the Great Ocean Road.

When to Book for Best Deals and Fewer Crowds
For the best India to Australia tour package, consider booking 3 to 4 months in advance, especially if departing from Delhi, Bangalore, or Chennai. Booking during airline sales or off-peak seasons (May–August) often yields 10–15% savings.

Frequently Asked Questions About Australia Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens need a visa to visit Australia?
Yes, Indian citizens require a tourist visa. Our team assists with documentation and application as part of the fully guided Australia tour packages from India. Processing time ranges from 15 to 30 days depending on embassy workload.

How long should a typical Australia tour be?
We recommend 7 to 10 days to cover key cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Gold Coast. Custom durations are available for families and honeymooners. Longer tours (14–21 days) are also available for those wanting to explore Western Australia or Tasmania.

Is Australia suitable for a family vacation or honeymoon?
Absolutely. With wildlife parks, beaches, reef tours, and romantic getaways, you can find the best India to Australia tour package for families and affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages with ease. Family packages often include child-friendly accommodations, theme park passes, and guided nature tours.

What is the Australia tour packages from India price?
Prices vary depending on the city of departure and inclusions. On average, Australia tour packages from India price range from ₹1.5L to ₹3.5L per person for a 7 to 10-day trip. For the most accurate pricing, consult a Travelxploria advisor who can customize based on group size, hotel class, and destinations.

Which is the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour?
Travelxploria is widely regarded as the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour, known for curated itineraries, competitive pricing, and expert support. We are also recognized by international tourism boards and offer 24/7 support for all clients.

Are group tour options available for Australia?
Yes, we offer Australia group tour packages for corporate teams, schools, and families, complete with guides, transfers, and custom itineraries. Ask about our early bird discounts and exclusive group leader benefits.

How to Book the Best India to Australia Tour Package

Recommended Indian Travel Agencies for Australia Tours
Choose Travelxploria, the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour, known for excellent customer service and detailed planning. Verified by over 10,000 happy travelers and rated 4.8 stars on leading review platforms.

Online Travel Portals and Booking Tips
Compare packages online, check reviews, and look for offers that include airfare and visa assistance for the most value-packed experience. Booking through Travelxploria ensures transparent pricing and personalized support.

Documents, Currency, and Packing Essentials
Carry valid passports, visa approval, insurance, and an international debit card. Essentials include power adapters, sunscreen, and weather-appropriate clothing. Australian dollars (AUD) can be pre-ordered via your travel agent. Always carry a universal power adapter (Type I).
Planning a multi-destination trip? Explore other popular routes like India to Singapore Tour Package, India to Thailand Tour Package, and India to Vietnam Tour Package for your next adventure.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia's arts and cultural capital.
  • Discover stunning wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade tour.
  • Explore the iconic Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s scenic coastal wonders.
  • Depart Melbourne with a seamless shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in tropical Cairns and prepare for nature-filled adventures.
  • Journey through ancient rainforests via Skyrail & Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Cruise to Green Island for a full day on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart from Cairns with a smooth shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and dive into sun, surf, and excitement.
  • Enjoy Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds Pass.​
  • Depart Gold Coast with a comfortable shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a Big Bus hop-on hop-off pass and Merlin Attractions.
  • Embark on a full-day Blue Mountains adventure through nature and history.
  • Depart from Sydney, bringing home unforgettable memories of Australia.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

Then, unleash your inner superhero at Movie World, home to the Southern Hemisphere's tallest, fastest, and longest DC Rivals HyperCoaster. Meet iconic DC Super Heroes and Super-Villains, and create lasting memories in a world of excitement and wonder.

Dive into a world of excitement as you explore iconic attractions, captivating shows, and family-friendly fun that caters to visitors of all ages. Let the magic of these world-class theme parks keep your journey alive and exhilarating.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to the cultural capital of Australia
  •  Phillip Island Penguin Parade – Enjoy an unforgettable wildlife encounter on a small group eco tour.
  • Great Ocean Road Scenic Tour – Discover the dramatic coastline and iconic natural landmarks.
  • Depart Melbourne – Shared transfer to the airport for your next destination.
  • Arrive in Cairns – Step into the tropical gateway of the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Skyrail & Kuranda Scenic Railway – Explore ancient rainforests and scenic mountain views.
  • Green Island Reef Cruise – Cruise to Green Island for a full day of reef and relaxation.
  • Depart from Cairns – Transfer to Cairns Airport for your onward flight.
  • Big Bus Discover + Merlin Attractions – Hop-on, hop-off sightseeing plus entry to top Sydney attractions.
  • Blue Mountains Express Tour – Explore stunning natural beauty and local wildlife.
  • Depart from Sydney – Say goodbye to Australia with unforgettable memories in tow.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

Explore Sydney at your own pace aboard the Big Bus Sydney, an open-top double-decker bus offering a flexible hop-on, hop-off experience with informative commentary in multiple languages. Discover iconic attractions like the Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach, with the freedom to disembark and explore museums, cafes, and scenic walks at your leisure. With ticket options valid for 24 or 48 hours, this convenient and scenic tour is perfect for both short visits and longer stays, offering an unforgettable way to experience the best of Sydney.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne and begin your Australian adventure.
  • Experience wildlife and the famous Penguin Parade on Phillip Island.
  • Discover the stunning Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s Surf Coast.
  • Transfer from Melbourne to the airport and fly to the Gold Coast.
  • Enjoy thrilling fun at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Depart the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Explore Sydney with a 24-hour Big Bus hop-on-hop-off pass and visit four top attractions.
  • Take a full-day tour of the breathtaking Blue Mountains.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home wonderful memories of Australia.​

Enjoy a stress-free arrival as our Travelxploria representative warmly welcomes you at the airport and escorts you to your 4-star hotel in Melbourne’s Central Business District, where a comfortable stay with breakfast included awaits you.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Embark on a full-day adventure along Victoria's stunning Surf Coast, just a short drive from Melbourne, as you journey along the iconic Great Ocean Road. Discover the awe-inspiring Twelve Apostles, stroll through charming coastal towns, and immerse yourself in the rich history of landmarks like the enchanting Loch Ard Gorge. This unforgettable experience includes morning tea and offers the perfect blend of natural beauty and cultural heritage. Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne and settle into the heart of Australia’s cultural capital.
  • Witness the enchanting Penguin Parade on Phillip Island with a small-group eco tour.
  • Explore the stunning Great Ocean Road and Victoria’s iconic Surf Coast.​
  • Depart Melbourne with a smooth shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive at the Gold Coast and enjoy seamless travel with the ROO Pass.
  • Dive into adventure at both Movie World and Sea World with a combo pass.
  • Bid farewell to the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Discover Sydney’s highlights with a Big Bus tour and Merlin’s top four attractions.
  • Experience the majestic Blue Mountains on a full-day guided excursion.
  • Day 10: Depart from Sydney, carrying unforgettable memories of your Australian journey.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Explore Sydney at your own pace aboard the Big Bus Sydney, an open-top double-decker bus offering a flexible hop-on, hop-off experience with informative commentary in multiple languages. Discover iconic attractions like the Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach, with the freedom to disembark and explore museums, cafes, and scenic walks at your leisure. With ticket options valid for 24 or 48 hours, this convenient and scenic tour is perfect for both short visits and longer stays, offering an unforgettable way to experience the best of Sydney.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne, the vibrant Arts and Cultural Capital of Australia.
  • Witness breathtaking wildlife and the iconic Penguin Parade at Phillip Island.
  • Discover Melbourne’s history, art, and café culture on a half-day city tour.
  • Journey along the scenic Great Ocean Road and explore Victoria’s Surf Coast.
  • Bid farewell to Melbourne with a private transfer to the airport for your next adventure.
  • Arrive in the Gold Coast and enjoy a seamless transfer with your ROO Pass.
  • Dive into thrills at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Soar above the Hinterland with a hot air balloon ride and enjoy a bonus Arro Jet experience.
  • Depart the Gold Coast with a private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Sydney and explore top attractions with your Merli

  • n Four Attraction Pass.
  • Dive deeper into Sydney with an Opera House tour and a full-day Blue Mountains experience.
  • Depart Sydney, carrying unforgettable memories of your Australian adventure.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

On Day 7, bid farewell to the tropical charm of the Gold Coast as you embark on a smooth and stress-free departure with a shared transfer from your hotel to Brisbane Airport, ensuring a seamless transition to your onward journey.

Explore Sydney at your own pace aboard the Big Bus Sydney, an open-top double-decker bus offering a flexible hop-on, hop-off experience with informative commentary in multiple languages. Discover iconic attractions like the Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach, with the freedom to disembark and explore museums, cafes, and scenic walks at your leisure. With ticket options valid for 24 or 48 hours, this convenient and scenic tour is perfect for both short visits and longer stays, offering an unforgettable way to experience the best of Sydney.

","a_weekday":"[]","a_offday":"[]","status":"A","supplier":"","relative_city":"[\"Sydney\"]","inserted_id":"[867]","edited_by_id":null,"inserted_by_id":"Shouvik","imageurl":"","images":"[{\"path\":\"/Activity/Sydney/Big Bus Sydney/1747383463350-Big Bus Sydney 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Sydney/Big Bus Sydney/1747383463581-Big Bus Sydney 1.jpg\"},{\"path\":\"/Activity/Sydney/Big Bus Sydney/1747383463670-Big Bus Sydney.jpg\"}]"}}]},{"day_title":"Merlin Four Attraction Pass - Sydney Opera House Tour","day_summary":"

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

As you prepare to depart, our Travelxploria representative will be there to ensure a smooth transition and assist with your departure. Take a moment to reflect on the cherished memories and experiences gathered throughout your adventure Down Under—whether it’s the warmth of Australian hospitality, awe-inspiring landscapes, or countless moments of joy and discovery. While your time in Australia may be coming to an end, the memories you've created will stay with you and enrich your life for years to come.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne.
  • Experience wildlife and breathtaking views at Phillip Island Penguin Parade.
  • Transfer from Melbourne hotel to Melbourne Airport for departure.
  • Enjoy a full day of underwater wonders at the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Relax and explore the pristine Whitsunday Islands and Whitehaven Beach.
  • Transfer from Airlie Beach hotel to Proserpine Airport for departure.
  • Spend a full day at Tangalooma Resort with access to all facilities.
  • Cruise to Lone Pine Sanctuary and explore the world’s largest koala sanctuary.
  • Discover the Sydney Opera House and explore the city with a 24-hour Big Bus tour, followed by a Showboat Dinner Cruise.
  • Depart from Sydney, concluding your unforgettable Australian adventure.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

This 9-hour adventure offers a day filled with breathtaking beauty and underwater wonders, beginning with a scenic return cruise showcasing the turquoise waters and pristine beaches of the islands. Spend four unforgettable hours at Hardy Reef, where you can snorkel among vibrant coral gardens and diverse marine life, with all gear provided—including wetsuits and stinger suits. Discover the reef’s enchanting ecosystem through an underwater observatory and a guided semi-submarine tour for a unique below-the-surface perspective. To keep you refreshed throughout the day, enjoy delicious morning tea, lunch, and afternoon tea as part of this extraordinary experience.

Relax on the world-famous white sands, take a refreshing swim, or explore the pristine shoreline, all while enjoying a generous morning or afternoon tea. For added safety, protective stinger suits are provided. Elevate your experience with the optional Solway Circuit walk, offering breathtaking views of the surrounding seascape, making this excursion a perfect blend of relaxation and exploration in the heart of the Whitsundays.

Enjoy the sights and sounds of the Brisbane River on a delightful 5-hour adventure with Mirimar Cruises, featuring a return river cruise to Lone Pine Koala Sanctuary with admission included. Spend three unforgettable hours exploring the world’s largest koala sanctuary, home to over 130 koalas and a variety of native Australian wildlife. After your visit, relax on the ultra-modern cruise boat during the return journey, where you can unwind with a glass of Australian wine or beer (at your own expense). This cruise offers the perfect blend of wildlife encounters and scenic relaxation along Brisbane’s picturesque river.

Ease your departure with our seamless shared transfer service from your Brisbane Central Business District hotel to Brisbane Airport, ensuring a smooth and stress-free farewell to the city. Leave Brisbane with peace of mind, carrying cherished memories of your time spent in this vibrant destination that will last a lifetime.

Explore Sydney at your own pace aboard the Big Bus Sydney, an open-top double-decker bus offering a flexible hop-on, hop-off experience with informative commentary in multiple languages. Discover iconic attractions like the Sydney Opera House, Harbour Bridge, Darling Harbour, and Bondi Beach, with the freedom to disembark and explore museums, cafes, and scenic walks at your leisure. With ticket options valid for 24 or 48 hours, this convenient and scenic tour is perfect for both short visits and longer stays, offering an unforgettable way to experience the best of Sydney.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

Enjoy a spectacular evening aboard the Sydney Showboat Dinner Cruise, where you’ll indulge in a luxurious dining experience while gliding through the sparkling waters of Sydney Harbour. Take in breathtaking views of iconic landmarks such as the Sydney Opera House and Harbour Bridge, all set against the backdrop of elegant surroundings and a lively atmosphere. This unforgettable cruise offers the perfect blend of fine dining and scenic beauty, making it an ideal way to create lasting memories in one of the world’s most stunning harbours.

packages.overview:
• ​Arrive in Melbourne and enjoy breathtaking views from the Eureka Skydeck.
  • Witness the magic of wildlife on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade Eco Tour.
  • Discover the scenic wonders along the iconic Great Ocean Road.​
  • Depart Melbourne with a shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive on the Gold Coast and explore Movie World & Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.
  • Soar over the Gold Coast Hinterland on a serene hot air balloon ride with bonus Arro Jet experience.
  • Depart the Gold Coast via private transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Sydney and explore top attractions with the Merlin Four Attraction Pass.
  • Venture into the Blue Mountains for a day of natural beauty, history, and wildlife.
  • Depart from Sydney, wrapping up your unforgettable Australian adventure.​

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne and explore its rich sporting heritage with a guided MCG tour.
  • Witness nature’s wonders on the Phillip Island Penguin Parade Eco Tour.
  • Journey along the Great Ocean Road to see Victoria’s most iconic coastal sights.
  • Depart Melbourne with a shared transfer to the airport.
  • Arrive in Cairns and discover ancient rainforests via the Skyrail and Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Cruise to Green Island and explore the Great Barrier Reef with snorkeling or glass-bottom boat options.
  • Depart Cairns with a shared hotel-to-airport transfer.
  • Arrive on the Gold Coast, transfer from Brisbane Airport, and enjoy a magical Glow Worm night tour.
  • Dive into excitement with access to both Movie World and Sea World, and soar on a hot air balloon adventure.
  • Bid farewell to the Gold Coast with a shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Sydney and explore four top attractions with the Merlin Pass, including the Tower Eye and Madame Tussauds.
  • Visit Taronga Zoo by ferry and experience Sydney from above on a scenic helicopter flight.
  • Depart Sydney, concluding your unforgettable Australian journey.

[{"city":"Melbourne","country":"Australia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892745-AdobeStock_571879591.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892229-AdobeStock_122918061.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058891761-AdobeStock_14809750.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892054-AdobeStock_78014018.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892400-AdobeStock_123778075.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892573-AdobeStock_158368495.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Melbourne","day_summary":"

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free transfer from the airport directly to your 4-star hotel in Melbourne's Central Business District, where a comfortable stay with breakfast included awaits you.

Discover Melbourne's vibrant sporting culture with an immersive behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG), delving into its storied past and world-class facilities. During the one-hour tour, explore highlights such as the renowned MCC Long Room, the historic MCC Library (established in 1873), the MCG Tapestry, player change rooms, and the cricketers’ viewing room. Gain exclusive access to the Ron Casey Media Centre, admire the portraits of cricket legends Sir Donald Bradman and Sachin Tendulkar, and enjoy a rare walk on the arena itself. The tour also includes a visit to the Cricket Victoria Bill Lawry Centre, the Ponsford Stand, and the City Terrace, offering stunning panoramic views of Melbourne’s skyline.

Discover Melbourne's vibrant sporting culture with an immersive behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG), delving into its storied past and world-class facilities. During the one-hour tour, explore highlights such as the renowned MCC Long Room, the historic MCC Library (established in 1873), the MCG Tapestry, player change rooms, and the cricketers’ viewing room. Gain exclusive access to the Ron Casey Media Centre, admire the portraits of cricket legends Sir Donald Bradman and Sachin Tendulkar, and enjoy a rare walk on the arena itself. The tour also includes a visit to the Cricket Victoria Bill Lawry Centre, the Ponsford Stand, and the City Terrace, offering stunning panoramic views of Melbourne’s skyline.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Enjoy pickup from selected hotels or nearby designated points before embarking on a remarkable journey through one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical regions, preserved for over 130 million years. Soar above the lush canopy between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking views of Barron Gorge and the UNESCO-listed Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the natural wonders of Red Peak and marvel at the stunning Barron Falls, all culminating in a truly unforgettable rainforest adventure. Please note: return to the hotel is on your own after the tour.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

Say goodbye to the hassle of navigating unfamiliar roads with a smooth, stress-free transfer from Brisbane Airport to the Gold Coast. Travel in comfort aboard a modern, air-conditioned vehicle that ensures a quick and convenient journey, allowing you to relax and focus on the exciting adventures that await at your destination.

Embark on a captivating nocturnal adventure through the mystical rainforest, illuminated by the soft glow of torchlight. Journey along scenic mountain roads with breathtaking views of the Scenic Rim and Gold Coast before delving into the rainforest’s hidden wonders. Discover the secrets of its nocturnal wildlife and be mesmerized by the stunning Curtis Falls. The highlight of the experience is witnessing the magical glow worms adorning the rock faces—an awe-inspiring natural spectacle unique to Australia’s east coast. Duration: Approx 4 hours, with pickup and drop-off from selected hotels or nearby points.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

Discover Taronga Zoo, Sydney’s iconic wildlife sanctuary nestled on the picturesque Sydney Harbour, with the convenience of the Zoo Express package that includes a return ferry ride and zoo entry. Skip the hassle of buses by entering through the Lower Zoo Entrance near the wharf or enjoy a scenic public bus ride to the Main Entrance. From 9:00am daily, immerse yourself in a day of wildlife wonder, complete with engaging keeper presentations featuring seals, koalas, giraffes, and more—perfectly blending ease and adventure.



Soar above Sydney’s breathtaking landscape on an exhilarating 20-minute helicopter joy flight, offering unparalleled panoramic views of the city’s iconic landmarks. Begin your adventure with a warm welcome and safety briefing before taking to the skies, where you’ll capture unforgettable moments over Maroubra Beach, Coogee, and Bondi. Trace the eastern coastline, glide past Dover Heights and Vaucluse, and marvel at aerial views of the Sydney Harbour Bridge, Opera House, Taronga Zoo, Watsons Bay, and Manly Cove. With insightful commentary through Bose headsets, this scenic flight delivers the ultimate bird’s-eye perspective of Sydney, making for an unforgettable experience.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Broome and immerse yourself in its rich history, natural beauty, and vibrant culture.
  • Explore Broome’s highlights with a half-day tour including Willie Creek, Matso Brewery, and a sunset drinks & nibbles experience.
  • Discover ancient wonders on a scenic cruise featuring dinosaur footprints, sparkling wine, and a gourmet platter.
  • Enjoy a free day to relax or explore Broome at your own pace.
  • Depart from Broome, taking with you the unforgettable memories of your journey.​

Begin your journey at Willie Creek, where you'll delve into the fascinating pearling industry and admire exquisite pearls. Continue to Matso's Brewery, famous for its unique craft beers and refreshing ginger beer, where you'll enjoy a tasting session highlighting locally inspired flavors. Conclude your afternoon at a scenic spot with sunset drinks and nibbles, soaking in breathtaking views as the sun sets over Broome, creating the perfect end to a memorable day.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Welcome to Australia’s cultural capital.
  • Witness nature’s magic at the Phillip Island Penguin Parade.
  • Explore the breathtaking sights along the Great Ocean Road.
  • Depart Melbourne and head to your next adventure in Sydney.
  • Discover Sydney's top attractions with the Merlin Two Attraction Pass and Sydney Opera House Tour, then soar above the city on a thrilling helicopter flight.
  • Experience the stunning Blue Mountains at sunset.
  • Depart from Sydney and begin your island escape at Tangalooma.
  • Unwind at Tangalooma Island Resort amidst unspoiled natural beauty.
  • Enjoy the final moments on Tangalooma before heading to the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into the fun with theme park access and a magical hot air balloon ride.
  • Depart from the Gold Coast, taking cherished memories home with you.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

Pickup is available from Melbourne’s Central Business District around 7:00 AM, with exact details confirmed 24 hours before departure.

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Melbourne – Explore the city’s iconic landmarks including the MCG and Eureka Skydeck.
  • Discover Phillip Island’s wildlife and experience the magical Penguin Parade on a small group eco tour.
  • Journey along the scenic Great Ocean Road and marvel at Victoria’s spectacular coastline.
  • Depart Melbourne and travel to the vibrant coastal paradise of the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into fun with the Best of Both Worlds pass at Movie World and Sea World.
  • Soar above the hinterland on a hot air balloon ride, paired with a complimentary Arro Jet experience.
  • Bid farewell to Gold Coast and transfer to your next destination—Hamilton Island.
  • Enjoy a full-day Cruise Whitsundays tour to explore the marine wonders of the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Relax and explore Hamilton Island at your own pace with a leisurely free day.
  • Depart from Hamilton Island and head to the stunning harbour city of Sydney.
  • Use your Merlin Four Attraction Pass to discover Sydney’s top attractions and join a guided Opera House tour.
  • Witness the beauty of the Blue Mountains at sunset on an unforgettable full-day tour.
  • Depart from Sydney, taking home the cherished memories of your incredible Australian journey.

[{"city":"Melbourne","country":"Australia","banner_image":[{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892745-AdobeStock_571879591.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892229-AdobeStock_122918061.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058891761-AdobeStock_14809750.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892054-AdobeStock_78014018.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892400-AdobeStock_123778075.jpeg"},{"path":"/Destination/Australia/Melbourne/1747058892573-AdobeStock_158368495.jpeg"}],"day_details":[{"day_title":"Arrival in Melbourne","day_summary":"

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free arrival in Melbourne with a comfortable transfer from the airport directly to your 4-star hotel located in the heart of the Central Business District, where a delicious breakfast is included as part of your stay.

Discover Melbourne's vibrant sporting culture with an immersive behind-the-scenes tour of the iconic Melbourne Cricket Ground (MCG), delving into its storied past and world-class facilities. During the one-hour tour, explore highlights such as the renowned MCC Long Room, the historic MCC Library (established in 1873), the MCG Tapestry, player change rooms, and the cricketers’ viewing room. Gain exclusive access to the Ron Casey Media Centre, admire the portraits of cricket legends Sir Donald Bradman and Sachin Tendulkar, and enjoy a rare walk on the arena itself. The tour also includes a visit to the Cricket Victoria Bill Lawry Centre, the Ponsford Stand, and the City Terrace, offering stunning panoramic views of Melbourne’s skyline.

Discover Melbourne from an entirely new vantage point at the Melbourne Skydeck, the highest observation deck in the Southern Hemisphere, where the city stretches out beneath you from an awe-inspiring height of nearly 300 meters. This unforgettable experience offers breathtaking panoramic views and a thrilling perspective that truly takes you to new heights.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Sydney – Welcome to the harbourfront city of iconic landmarks and global attractions.
  • Explore Sydney’s top attractions with the Merlin Four Attraction Pass and a guided Sydney Opera House tour.
  • Soar above Sydney on a thrilling helicopter ride and cruise to Taronga Zoo for a wild encounter.
  • Depart Sydney with a seamless transfer to the airport and head to the Gold Coast.
  • Dive into fun at Movie World and Sea World with the Best of Both Worlds pass.​
  • Drift above the Gold Coast Hinterland on a hot air balloon ride with a complimentary Arro Jet experience.
  • Bid farewell to the Gold Coast with a shared transfer to Brisbane Airport.
  • Arrive in Cairns and journey through the ancient rainforest via the Skyrail and Kuranda Scenic Railway.
  • Enjoy a full-day cruise to the breathtaking Green Island on the Great Barrier Reef.
  • Depart Cairns with a smooth hotel-to-airport transfer for your flight to Melbourne.​
  • Embark on the scenic Great Ocean Road Tour and explore Victoria’s stunning coastline.
  • Witness the magical Penguin Parade on Phillip Island with a small group eco tour.
  • Conclude your Australian adventure and depart from Melbourne with sweet memories in tow.​

Sydney Tower Eye: Soaring high above the city for over 30 years, the Sydney Tower Eye is an enduring symbol of innovation and adventure, offering breathtaking panoramic views and serving as a guiding landmark in the heart of Sydney’s skyline.

WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo: Discover the wonders of Australia’s unique fauna as you embark on an unforgettable journey through WILD LIFE Sydney Zoo, where close encounters with iconic and fascinating native animals bring the country’s rich biodiversity to life.

SEA LIFE Sydney: Dive into one of the world’s largest and most impressive aquariums at SEA LIFE Sydney, home to over 700 species and 13,000 marine animals thriving in six million liters of water, offering an immersive and educational underwater experience.

Madame Tussauds Sydney: Located in Darling Harbour, Madame Tussauds Sydney delivers an exciting day of interactive fun where you can meet incredibly lifelike wax figures of your favorite celebrities and enjoy a range of engaging exhibits right in the heart of Sydney’s CBD.

Step inside the iconic Sydney Opera House and uncover its legendary history, intriguing secrets, and architectural brilliance during an immersive one-hour guided tour. Journey through its captivating interior spaces, relive unforgettable performances, and gain fascinating insights into its controversial past and visionary future. As you explore Australia’s most beloved building, you'll be enchanted by close-up views of its world-renowned design and the vibrant energy that fills every corner. This unforgettable experience offers a unique perspective on a true cultural masterpiece. *Tours run daily, subject to availability; admission included.

Discover Taronga Zoo, Sydney’s iconic wildlife sanctuary nestled on the picturesque Sydney Harbour, with the convenience of the Zoo Express package that includes a return ferry ride and zoo entry. Skip the hassle of buses by entering through the Lower Zoo Entrance near the wharf or enjoy a scenic public bus ride to the Main Entrance. From 9:00am daily, immerse yourself in a day of wildlife wonder, complete with engaging keeper presentations featuring seals, koalas, giraffes, and more—perfectly blending ease and adventure.

Soar above Sydney’s breathtaking landscape on an exhilarating 20-minute helicopter joy flight, offering unparalleled panoramic views of the city’s iconic landmarks. Begin your adventure with a warm welcome and safety briefing before taking to the skies, where you’ll capture unforgettable moments over Maroubra Beach, Coogee, and Bondi. Trace the eastern coastline, glide past Dover Heights and Vaucluse, and marvel at aerial views of the Sydney Harbour Bridge, Opera House, Taronga Zoo, Watsons Bay, and Manly Cove. With insightful commentary through Bose headsets, this scenic flight delivers the ultimate bird’s-eye perspective of Sydney, making for an unforgettable experience.

Soar above Sydney’s breathtaking landscape on an exhilarating 20-minute helicopter joy flight, offering unparalleled panoramic views of the city’s iconic landmarks. Begin your adventure with a warm welcome and safety briefing before taking to the skies, where you’ll capture unforgettable moments over Maroubra Beach, Coogee, and Bondi. Trace the eastern coastline, glide past Dover Heights and Vaucluse, and marvel at aerial views of the Sydney Harbour Bridge, Opera House, Taronga Zoo, Watsons Bay, and Manly Cove. With insightful commentary through Bose headsets, this scenic flight delivers the ultimate bird’s-eye perspective of Sydney, making for an unforgettable experience.

Day 4 marks your departure from the vibrant urban oasis of Sydney, as you enjoy a seamless shared transfer from your hotel to Sydney Airport, ensuring a smooth and stress-free start to the next leg of your journey.

Say goodbye to the hassle of navigating unfamiliar roads with a smooth, stress-free transfer from Brisbane Airport to the Gold Coast. Travel in comfort aboard a modern, air-conditioned vehicle that ensures a quick and convenient journey, allowing you to relax and focus on the exciting adventures that await at your destination.

Embark on a captivating nocturnal adventure through the mystical rainforest, illuminated by the soft glow of torchlight. Journey along scenic mountain roads with breathtaking views of the Scenic Rim and Gold Coast before delving into the rainforest’s hidden wonders. Discover the secrets of its nocturnal wildlife and be mesmerized by the stunning Curtis Falls. The highlight of the experience is witnessing the magical glow worms adorning the rock faces—an awe-inspiring natural spectacle unique to Australia’s east coast. Duration: Approx 4 hours, with pickup and drop-off from selected hotels or nearby points.

Embark on a journey through time and nature as you explore one of the world’s oldest and most captivating botanical realms, preserved for over 130 million years. Glide effortlessly between Smithfield in Cairns and the picturesque village of Kuranda, taking in breathtaking bird’s-eye views of Barron Gorge and the renowned Wet Tropics World Heritage Area. Along the way, immerse yourself in the lush heart of the rainforest at Red Peak and marvel at the powerful beauty of Barron Falls, adding unforgettable depth and wonder to this extraordinary adventure.

Enjoy a full-day adventure to the stunning Green Island with convenient pickup and drop-off from centrally located hotels, lasting approximately 8 hours. Set sail from Cairns aboard the luxurious 35-meter ‘Big Cat’ catamaran, offering a comfortable and scenic cruise to this breathtaking coral cay. Once on the island, explore its natural beauty and vibrant marine life with your choice of complimentary snorkeling gear or a glass-bottom boat tour (excluding Transfer Only option). The fare includes a snorkeling demonstration, informative reef presentation en route, use of the air-conditioned Big Cat as a base on the island, access to scenic rainforest boardwalks, a delicious buffet lunch, and a semi-submarine tour for a unique underwater perspective.

Phillip Island Penguin Parade

Discover the natural wonder of Phillip Island, home to the world’s largest colony of Little Penguins. As twilight falls and the sky glows with golden hues, witness the magical moment when these charming penguins waddle ashore in a heartwarming nightly ritual — an unforgettable spectacle of nature.

Moonlit Sanctuary Wildlife Conservation Park

Step into the heart of Australia’s unique wildlife at Moonlit Sanctuary. Stroll through lush bushland and meet over 70 fascinating native species. Hand-feed friendly kangaroos and wallabies, cuddle a koala, and encounter colorful birds, intriguing reptiles, curious dingoes, and other extraordinary animals in this immersive conservation experience.

Brighton Beach Bathing Boxes

Explore the vibrant charm of Melbourne’s iconic Brighton Bathing Boxes. These historic, brightly painted beach huts line the shore with artistic flair, offering a picturesque blend of coastal beauty, cultural heritage, and captivating color — perfect for memorable photos and seaside strolls.

{"title":"Shane A Dsouza","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-03-04","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

it was an excellent trip to Vietnam very well coordinated by Bikram and team. overview:
Best India to Australia Tour Package – Explore the Land Down Under in Style
Start your journey with the best India to Australia tour package, a seamless blend of iconic landmarks, thrilling adventures, and unique cultural experiences. Whether you're traveling with family, on a honeymoon, or part of a group, Travelxploria offers fully guided Australia tour packages from India designed to match your travel style and budget. For more exciting destinations, explore our popular India to Bali Tour Package or India to Malaysia Tour Package.
"Over 3 lakh Indian tourists visited Australia in 2023," according to Tourism Australia, reflecting the growing popularity of curated international travel among Indian families and honeymooners.

Why Choose an Australia Tour Package from India?

Iconic Landmarks, Natural Wonders, and Vibrant Cities
Australia captivates with its contrasting landscapes and dynamic cities. From the world-renowned Sydney Opera House to the majestic Great Barrier Reef, every destination offers an unforgettable moment. With a fully guided Australia tour package from India, you’ll explore top sites with ease and comfort.
All guided sightseeing tours are led by certified professionals with local knowledge, ensuring both safety and depth of experience.

Ideal for Families, Honeymooners, and Adventure Seekers
Whether you're seeking the best India to Australia tour package for families or looking for affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages, Travelxploria has tailored options. Our tours combine adventure, relaxation, and cultural immersion for all types of travelers. For honeymoon plans, check out our dedicated honeymoon packages, and solo explorers can find curated options in our solo travel packages.
Sample testimonial: "Travelxploria made our honeymoon magical. From a private Great Barrier Reef cruise to wine tasting in Yarra Valley, everything was seamless!" – Priya & Rakesh, New Delhi.

Easy Travel Options and Visa Process for Indian Tourists
Enjoy hassle-free visa assistance, smooth flight bookings, and expert planning. Whether you're booking an Australia tour package from Delhi, Bangalore, or Chennai, our experienced team ensures a seamless travel experience.
Australia tourist visa fees for Indian citizens start at approximately ₹9,500. We assist with document preparation and submission through certified travel advisors.

Top India to Australia Tour Packages

7 to 10 Days Australia Tour Package from India – Sydney, Melbourne & Gold Coast
This itinerary includes highlights like the Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach, Federation Square, and Surfers Paradise. Ideal for families and couples, it’s part of our best India to Australia tour package lineup.
Starting from ₹1.65L per person, this package includes round-trip flights, 3-star accommodations, daily breakfast, city tours, and visa processing.

Australia Honeymoon Packages from India
Our affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages include romantic experiences like wine tasting in Yarra Valley, sunset cruises in Sydney, and private Great Barrier Reef tours.
Customizations like candlelight dinners, couple photoshoots, or secluded island visits are available upon request.

Budget-Friendly Australia Tour Packages for Indian Travelers
Our Australia tour packages from India are designed to fit every budget. From 3-star accommodations to optional add-ons, we offer transparency and value.
We ensure all costs are clearly outlined, including airfares, sightseeing tickets, and taxes—no hidden charges.

Customized Australia Itineraries for Families and Groups
Choose from a range of Australia group tour packages or request a customized itinerary based on your group’s preferences—ideal for families, student trips, or corporate teams.
Whether you're a group of 6 or 60, our specialists create personalized routes with dedicated guides, luxury coaches, and meal plans. For similar curated trips, browse our family tour packages.

Must-Visit Destinations Covered in Australia Tour Packages

 Sydney – Opera House, Harbour Bridge & Bondi Beach
Start your journey in Sydney, a city that blends urban flair with coastal charm. Highlights include the Sydney Opera House, Darling Harbour, and coastal walks.
Pro Tip: Book an early morning harbor cruise to see the sunrise over the Opera House — an unforgettable photo moment.

Melbourne – Art, Culture, and Great Ocean Road
Known for its creativity and café culture, Melbourne also gives access to the scenic Great Ocean Road, making it a must in any Australia tour package.
We include visits to Twelve Apostles, coastal cliffs, and optional wildlife sanctuaries.

Gold Coast – Beaches, Theme Parks & Nightlife
Home to Dreamworld, Sea World, and pristine beaches, Gold Coast is a favorite in both Australia tour packages from India and family-oriented holidays.
Kids under 12 enjoy discounted theme park entries when booked in advance with our packages.

Cairns – Great Barrier Reef Adventures
A gateway to one of the world's natural wonders, Cairns is perfect for reef diving and snorkeling with guided reef tours included in many of our Australia tour packages.
Certified guides ensure safety for first-time snorkelers. Glass-bottom boat tours are also available for non-swimmers.

Brisbane, Perth & Tasmania – Offbeat and Scenic Add-ons
For those seeking hidden gems, explore Tasmania’s wilderness or enjoy city life in Brisbane and Perth, ideal for extension packages.
Tasmania’s Cradle Mountain and MONA Museum are highly recommended for nature lovers and art enthusiasts alike.

What’s Included in the Best India to Australia Tour Packages?

 Round-Trip Flights from Major Indian Cities
Travelxploria includes international flights in every best India to Australia tour package, with departures available from Delhi, Chennai, Mumbai, and Bangalore. Flight options include leading airlines like Singapore Airlines, Qantas, and Emirates, with 30kg checked baggage.

Hotel Accommodation with Breakfast
Enjoy stays in centrally located 3-star to 5-star hotels with breakfast, tailored to suit both families and honeymooners. Options available near beaches, city centers, or national parks, based on your preferences.

Local Transportation and Guided Sightseeing Tours
All packages offer local transfers and guided sightseeing, essential in any fully guided Australia tour package from India. Air-conditioned coaches, hotel pick-up/drop-off, and multilingual guides are standard inclusions.

Visa Assistance, Travel Insurance & Itinerary Planning
We provide end-to-end services, from visa documentation to curated daily itineraries and travel insurance. In addition to visa support, we offer optional travel insurance covering medical emergencies, cancellations, and baggage loss.

Best Time to Visit Australia from India

 Summer (December to February) – Ideal for Beach Holidays
This is the best time for visiting Sydney, Gold Coast, and Cairns if you're looking for sun and surf. Expect temperatures between 25–35°C. Book early to avoid peak season hotel surcharges.

Spring and Autumn – Perfect Weather for Outdoor Exploration
Mild temperatures and fewer crowds make these seasons perfect for sightseeing in Melbourne, Tasmania, and Perth. Great for photography, trekking, and scenic road trips like the Great Ocean Road.

When to Book for Best Deals and Fewer Crowds
For the best India to Australia tour package, consider booking 3 to 4 months in advance, especially if departing from Delhi, Bangalore, or Chennai. Booking during airline sales or off-peak seasons (May–August) often yields 10–15% savings.

Frequently Asked Questions About Australia Tour Packages from India

Do Indian citizens need a visa to visit Australia?
Yes, Indian citizens require a tourist visa. Our team assists with documentation and application as part of the fully guided Australia tour packages from India. Processing time ranges from 15 to 30 days depending on embassy workload.

How long should a typical Australia tour be?
We recommend 7 to 10 days to cover key cities like Sydney, Melbourne, and Gold Coast. Custom durations are available for families and honeymooners. Longer tours (14–21 days) are also available for those wanting to explore Western Australia or Tasmania.

Is Australia suitable for a family vacation or honeymoon?
Absolutely. With wildlife parks, beaches, reef tours, and romantic getaways, you can find the best India to Australia tour package for families and affordable India to Australia honeymoon packages with ease. Family packages often include child-friendly accommodations, theme park passes, and guided nature tours.

What is the Australia tour packages from India price?
Prices vary depending on the city of departure and inclusions. On average, Australia tour packages from India price range from ₹1.5L to ₹3.5L per person for a 7 to 10-day trip. For the most accurate pricing, consult a Travelxploria advisor who can customize based on group size, hotel class, and destinations.

Which is the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour?
Travelxploria is widely regarded as the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour, known for curated itineraries, competitive pricing, and expert support. We are also recognized by international tourism boards and offer 24/7 support for all clients.

Are group tour options available for Australia?
Yes, we offer Australia group tour packages for corporate teams, schools, and families, complete with guides, transfers, and custom itineraries. Ask about our early bird discounts and exclusive group leader benefits.

How to Book the Best India to Australia Tour Package

Recommended Indian Travel Agencies for Australia Tours
Choose Travelxploria, the best Indian travel agency for Australia tour, known for excellent customer service and detailed planning. Verified by over 10,000 happy travelers and rated 4.8 stars on leading review platforms.

Online Travel Portals and Booking Tips
Compare packages online, check reviews, and look for offers that include airfare and visa assistance for the most value-packed experience. Booking through Travelxploria ensures transparent pricing and personalized support.

Documents, Currency, and Packing Essentials
Carry valid passports, visa approval, insurance, and an international debit card. Essentials include power adapters, sunscreen, and weather-appropriate clothing. Australian dollars (AUD) can be pre-ordered via your travel agent. Always carry a universal power adapter (Type I).
Planning a multi-destination trip? Explore other popular routes like India to Singapore Tour Package, India to Thailand Tour Package, and India to Vietnam Tour Package for your next adventure.
